pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires promotion name to contain 'Volume Discount - Buy 5+ Save 10%'

Verified as real Drupal Commerce 8.x-2.x plugin at github.com/drupalcommerce/commerce/modules/promotion/src/Plugin/Commerce/PromotionOffer/OrderItemPercentageOff.php. Task description explicitly requires 'Order item percentage off' offer type.
Verified via Drupal Commerce documentation. Decimal format (0.10) is the correct internal representation for 10% in Drupal Commerce. Task requires '10%' discount.

Verified as real Drupal Commerce condition plugin. API documentation confirms OrderItemQuantity class exists in commerce/modules/promotion/src/Plugin/Commerce/Condition/OrderItemQuantity.php. Task requires 'Order item quantity' condition.
Task description explicitly requires condition 'greater than or equal to 5'
Verified as supported operator for OrderItemQuantity condition. Drupal Commerce OrderItemQuantity supports operators: '>', '>=', '<', '<=', '=='. Task requires '>=' operator.
Verified from seed_products.php which creates Urban Electronics store with id 1 as the default store. Drupal Commerce default store resolver typically uses store ID 1.

privileged_info_summary: Task setup_volume_discount@1 is a synthetic, self-contained Drupal Commerce tutorial task requiring creation of an automatic volume discount promotion. Verified metadata claims: Promotion name contains 'Volume Discount', offer plugin is 'order_item_percentage_off' (real Drupal Commerce 2.x order item-level discount plugin), discount percentage is 0.10 (correct decimal representation for 10%), condition plugin is 'order_item_quantity' (real Drupal Commerce condition), quantity threshold is 5, comparison operator is '>=' (all supported by OrderItemQuantity), and store_id 1 references Urban Electronics (default store created in environment setup). All metadata values are technically correct and correspond to real Drupal Commerce plugins and valid configuration options.
